stemHtml: Approaching Alicante, you want an RNAV approach to runway 28 via the IAF VILNA. What is the correct request?

options.a: Globe Air 213, request RNAV approach via VILNA, runway 28.
options.b: Alicante approach, Globe Air 213 request approach clearance for RNAV to runway 28.
options.c: Alicante approach, Globe Air 213 request RNAV approach via the initial approach fix to runway 28.
options.d: Globe Air 213 request RNAV approach clearance to runway 28.
